name: Matty Malneck
description: American jazz bandleader, violinist, violist and songwriter (1903-1981)
abstract: Matthew Michael "Matty" Malneck (December 9, 1903 – February 25, 1981) was an American jazz violinist, songwriter, and arranger.

about_quotes.speaker: William T. (Bill) Challis
about_quotes.evidence: I got the bass clarinet, and all the clarinets and strings and Matty doubled on the viola, he had a viola he liked to play, so Hoagy plays the thing over and sings it and I put down the accompaniment pretty much the way he plays it

about_quotes.speaker: Ray Sherman
about_quotes.evidence: God I had seen Milton playing with Manny Klein and Matty Malneck, you know that little group that they had... I think that was where Milton got his start
about_quotes.doc_title: Ray Sherman interviewed by Monk Rowe, San Diego, California, February 13, 1998

about_quotes.speaker: Maxine Sullivan
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] Matty Malneck is the musical -- Malneck. >> [INTERVIEWEE] Yeah, Matty Malneck.
